Defines memory limit macros for SDK applications based on SDK version and platform.

# Purpose
This header file defines macros that specify memory limits for SDK applications. The macros `APP_RAM_SYSTEM_SIZE`, `APP_RAM_2X_SIZE`, `APP_RAM_3X_SIZE`, and `APP_RAM_4X_SIZE` represent the total memory available for use by an SDK application, including stack, heap, text, data, and BSS segments. These memory limits are determined by the SDK version and platform on which the application is compiled. The file includes the `stddef.h` header to ensure the definition of the `size_t` type, which is used to specify the size of memory in bytes.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stddef.h`
